title: qsv DCAT-US v3 Dataset overlay
description: Wraps the vendored GSA Dataset.json with property definitions for the dcat-us:* namespace extensions qsv profile emits (bureauCode, programCode). Lets schema-aware tooling validate the shape of these extensions rather than silently ignoring them. Tracks the GSA bundle commit referenced in MANIFEST.json.

items.description: OMB MAX A-11 bureau code in NNN:NN form (e.g. 015:11).
OMB MAX A-11 program code in NNN:NNN form (e.g. 015:001).
